([Persian](/wiki/Persian_language "Persian language"): مزكان, also [Romanized](/wiki/Romanize "Romanize") as **Mazekān**; also known as **Mazeh Kān**)[[1]](#cite_note-1) is a village in [Pol Beh Bala Rural District](/wiki/Pol_Beh_Bala_Rural_District "Pol Beh Bala Rural District"), [Simakan District](/wiki/Simakan_District "Simakan District"), [Jahrom County](/wiki/Jahrom_County "Jahrom County"), [Fars province](/wiki/Fars_province "Fars province"), [Iran](/wiki/Iran "Iran"). At the 2006 census, its population was 934, in 206 families.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

Mazekan can be found at [GEOnet Names Server](/wiki/GEOnet_Names_Server "GEOnet Names Server"), at [this link](http://geonames.nga.mil/namesgaz/), by opening the Advanced Search box, entering "-3074446" in the "Unique Feature Id" form, and clicking on "Search Database".

["Census of the Islamic Republic of Iran, 1385 (2006)"](https://www.amar.org.ir/Portals/0/census/1385/results/all/07.xls) (Excel). [Statistical Center of Iran](/wiki/Statistical_Center_of_Iran "Statistical Center of Iran"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20110920084728/http://www.amar.org.ir/DesktopModules/FTPManager/upload/upload2360/newjkh/newjkh/07.xls) from the original on 2011-09-20.

**Mazekan** ([Persian](/wiki/Persian_language "Persian language"): مزكان, also [Romanized](/wiki/Romanize "Romanize") as **Mazekān**; also known as **Mazeh Kān**)[[1]](#cite_note-1) is a village in [Pol Beh Bala Rural District](/wiki/Pol_Beh_Bala_Rural_District "Pol Beh Bala Rural District"), [Simakan District](/wiki/Simakan_District "Simakan District"), [Jahrom County](/wiki/Jahrom_County "Jahrom County"), [Fars province](/wiki/Fars_province "Fars province"), [Iran](/wiki/Iran "Iran"). At the 2006 census, its population was 934, in 206 families.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
